vocab.example: My mother and I used to spend our weekends tending to various ornamental plants to brighten up our front porch.
Back then, I certainly didn't have a green thumb, as most of my botanical experiments ended in failure.

vocab.meaning: thảo mộc dùng trong nấu ăn
vocab.example: I was tasked with growing culinary herbs like cilantro and Thai basil, which were essential for our daily meals.
I found it fascinating to watch the climbing vines slowly wrap themselves around the wooden fence in our garden.
I started with drought-tolerant species like aloe vera because they required very little maintenance from a forgetful child.
I remember being mesmerized by the vibrant petals of the hibiscus flowers that bloomed every summer.
My grandfather allocated a small patch of land for me to experiment with growing morning glories.
Routine tasks like pruning and weeding taught me a great deal about patience and responsibility when I was young.
My science teacher encouraged us to grow indoor plants to improve air quality through natural carbon dioxide absorption.

vocab.meaning: tác động mang tính trị liệu/giải tỏa
vocab.example: Looking back, I realize that the simple act of watering my plants had profound therapeutic effects on my mood.
